process.label: Methodology
process.title: From briefing to delivery, without friction.
process.subtitle: A structured process to ensure that each recording is approved on the first try.

steps.title: Technical Briefing
steps.desc: Collection of intentions, target audience, and references to align the delivery.

steps.title: Recording & Mix
steps.desc: Capture in broadcast studio with cleaning and final audio treatment.

steps.title: Delivery & Feedback
steps.desc: Sending the audio ready for use, with agility and technical support.

studio.label: Elite Infrastructure
studio.title: Broadcast Quality, in record time.
studio.subtitle: Own studio with high performance acoustic treatment, premium equipment, and real-time connection for remote direction from anywhere in the world.

capabilities.title: Elite Capture
capabilities.desc: Professional microphone with dedicated acoustic studio treatment.

capabilities.title: Studio Mixing
capabilities.desc: Audio treatment with international broadcast level tools.

capabilities.title: Express Delivery
capabilities.desc: Simple projects in up to 24h. Larger campaigns with customized schedule.

capabilities.title: National Coverage
capabilities.desc: Remote service for agencies, production companies, and brands throughout Brazil.

certificate.label: Difference
certificate.title: Digitally Certified Audio.
certificate.desc: Each voiceover produced by Studio Sanzony.Voz receives a digital certificate of authenticity with SHA-256 technology, ensuring the integrity and originality of the audio.

features.title: Unique SHA-256 Hash
features.desc: Exclusive cryptographic fingerprint generated from the audio file.

features.title: Traceable Serial Number
features.desc: Code in SVZ-YEAR-MONTH-XXX format for quick location and auditing.

features.title: Verification QR Code
features.desc: Instant scanning on any device with a camera.

features.title: Legally Valid Document
features.desc: Timestamped record with provable authorship for contractual protection.

features.title: Protection Against Misuse
features.desc: We trace unauthorized copies and ensure the integrity of the delivery.

verification.label: Authenticity
verification.title: Verify

invalid.title: Certificate not found
